dialogue_text: You are a great chieftain now, John Carter,
source_excerpt: "You are a great chieftain now, John Carter," she said, "and I must do your bidding, though indeed I am glad to do it under any circumstances. The man whose metal you carry was young, but he was a great warrior, and had by his promotions...

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: and I must do your bidding, though indeed I am glad to do it under any circumstances. The man whose metal you carry was young, but he was a great warrior, and had by his promotions and kills won his way close to the rank of Tars Tarkas, who, as you know, is second to Lorquas Ptomel only. You are eleventh, there are but ten chieftains in this community who rank you in prowess.
source_excerpt: "You are a great chieftain now, John Carter," she said, "and I must do your bidding, though indeed I am glad to do it under any circumstances. The man whose metal you carry was young, but he was a great warrior, and had by his promotions...

speaker.notes: Context suggests a female speaker, but the source wording is still ambiguous.

dialogue_text: And if I should kill Lorquas Ptomel?
source_excerpt: "And if I should kill Lorquas Ptomel?" I asked.

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: You would be first, John Carter; but you may only win that honor by the will of the entire council that Lorquas Ptomel meet you in combat, or should he attack you, you may kill him in self-defense, and thus win first place.
source_excerpt: "You would be first, John Carter; but you may only win that honor by the will of the entire council that Lorquas Ptomel meet you in combat, or should he attack you, you may kill him in self-defense, and thus win first place."
